public_reputation: Known around Soreheim Proper through day-to-day work as labor foreman.
manner: Counts hands, strain, and failure points at a glance, then speaks like time is already too short. In Soreheim Proper, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of labor foreman in and around Soreheim Proper, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Soreheim Proper workable through the obligations of labor foreman while managing the immediate pressure of quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of labor foreman credible while absorbing the strain created by quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure.

adventure_hooks.summary: Cyran Hearthwrit can draw the party into a locality problem centered on labor foreman duties in Soreheim Proper.
Cyran Hearthwrit becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure around Soreheim Proper.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Cyran Hearthwrit is immediately readable as a labor foreman tied to Soreheim Proper.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Soreheim Proper: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Cyran Hearthwrit presents as someone shaped by the duties of a labor foreman and the daily pressures of Soreheim Proper.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a labor foreman, and proof that strangers will not make Soreheim Proper harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Cyran Hearthwrit refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a labor foreman too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can mobilize crews, tools, and practical labor access under pressure.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Cyran Hearthwrit adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Cyran Hearthwrit always knows more about Soreheim Proper than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a labor foreman in Soreheim Proper.
